about:
About Us

We make the boring-but-essential parts of business simple.

Startup And All was built on a simple frustration: getting a business registered or staying compliant in India is harder and more confusing than it needs to be. Founders are consistently quoted one price and billed another through disguised add-ons, or passed between call-centre agents who don't know their case.

We do it differently. Every client gets clear, upfront pricing, a single dedicated advisor, and guidance in language anyone can understand — from their first registration to complex compliance across a growing group.

Who we work with

  • First-time founders setting up their very first company.
  • SMEs needing reliable, recurring compliance reporting.
  • Freelancers, consultants, and independent professionals formalizing their work.
  • Fast-scaling groups expanding into new markets, licenses, or entity formats.
What we believe

Our values

Transparency first

You should never wonder what you're paying for — our professional fee and government fees are always shown separately.

Simple beats complicated

We translate legal and tax portal tasks into clear, actionable steps.

Relationships, not transactions

We work, refine, and aim to be the advisor you call comfortably for decades.

Let's build something that lasts.

Talk to an advisor

privacy-policy:
Legal

Privacy Policy

How Startup and All collects, uses, stores, shares, and protects your information.

Last updated: 04 June 2026Effective date: 04 June 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Startup and All (“we”, “us”, “our”, or the “Brand”), a brand owned and operated by Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP (the “Firm”), collects, uses, stores, shares, and protects your information when you access our website www.startupandall.com (the “Website”), or avail any of our services (the “Services”). By using the Website or Services, you consent to the practices described in this Policy.

This Policy is published in accordance with the provisions of the Information Technology Act, 2000, the Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Data or Information) Rules, 2011, the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023, and other applicable laws of India.

1. Who We Are

Startup and All is a private legal-tech and business facilitation platform that assists entrepreneurs, startups, and small and medium enterprises with company incorporation, registrations, statutory filings, compliance, and related administrative support. The Brand is operated by Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP, an LLP registered in India bearing LLP Identification Number ACX-9486, with its registered office at Pune, Maharashtra, India.

Startup and All is NOT a law firm, chartered accountancy firm, company secretary firm, trademark agent, or a representative of any Government authority, and does not solicit or advertise professional services. Where law requires professional involvement, such services are carried out only by independent, duly qualified professionals appointed separately in accordance with applicable law.

2. Information We Collect

2.1 Information You Provide to Us

  • Identity and contact details such as your name, email address, mobile number, and postal address.
  • KYC and statutory documents such as PAN, Aadhaar, passport, photographs, address proof, bank statements, and digital signature details, where required to deliver a Service.
  • Business information such as proposed company name, business activity, partner/director details, and shareholding information.
  • Payment information processed through our third-party payment gateway.

2.2 Information Collected Automatically

  • Device and usage data including IP address, browser type, operating system, pages visited, and time spent on the Website.
  • Cookies and similar tracking technologies (see Section 7).

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information collected for the following purposes:

  • To provide, process, and deliver the Services you request.
  • To prepare, file, and follow up on applications with the relevant Government authorities and professionals.
  • To communicate with you regarding your orders, queries, and service updates.
  • To process payments and issue invoices.
  • To comply with legal, regulatory, and statutory obligations.
  • To improve our Website, Services, and customer experience.
  • To send promotional or marketing communications, where you have opted in (you may opt out at any time).

4. Legal Basis and Consent

We process your personal data on the basis of your consent, the performance of a contract for Services, compliance with legal obligations, and our legitimate business interests. You may withdraw consent at any time by writing to us at info@startupandall.com; however, withdrawal may prevent us from delivering certain Services.

5. Disclosure and Sharing of Information

We do not sell or lease your personal data. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:

  • With independent Chartered Accountants, Company Secretaries, advocates, and other qualified professionals engaged to perform regulated tasks on your behalf.
  • With Government authorities, regulators, and statutory portals (such as the MCA, GST, and Income Tax portals) as necessary to deliver the Services.
  • With trusted third-party service providers such as payment gateways, cloud hosting, and communication providers, bound by confidentiality obligations.
  • Where required by law, court order, or to protect our legal rights.
  • In connection with a merger, acquisition, or transfer of business, subject to this Policy.

6. Data Retention

We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy legal, accounting, or regulatory requirements. Typically, records are retained for a period of 8 years from the completion of a Service, after which data is securely deleted or anonymised, unless a longer period is required by law.

7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

Our Website uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance functionality, analyse traffic, and personalise content. You may disable cookies through your browser settings; however, doing so may affect certain Website functionalities. We may also use analytics tools such as Google Analytics to understand usage patterns.

8. Data Security

We follow reasonable security practices and procedures as mandated under Indian law to protect your data from unauthorised access, misuse, alteration, or disclosure, including SSL encryption, restricted access controls, and secure servers. However, no method of transmission over the internet is fully secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

9. Your Rights

Subject to applicable law, you have the right to:

  • Access the personal data we hold about you.
  • Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
  • Request erasure of your data, subject to legal retention requirements.
  • Withdraw consent and opt out of marketing communications.
  • Lodge a grievance with our Grievance Officer (see Section 12).

10. Third-Party Links

Our Website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices, content, or accuracy of such third-party websites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies before sharing any information.

11. Children’s Privacy

Our Services are intended for users who are 18 years of age or older. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If we become aware that we have inadvertently collected such data, we will take steps to delete it.

12. Grievance Officer

In accordance with the Information Technology Act, 2000 and the rules thereunder, the contact details of the Grievance Officer are provided below:

Name: Sachin Gadekar
Designation: Designated Partner
Email: info@startupandall.com
Address: Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP, Pune, Maharashtra, India

We endeavour to acknowledge grievances within 48 hours and resolve them within 15 days of receipt.

13. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with a revised “Last updated” date and will become effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Website constitutes acceptance of the revised Policy.

14. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This Policy shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. The courts at Pune, Maharashtra shall have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising out of or relating to this Policy.

15. Contact Us

For any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP (operating as Startup and All)
Pune, Maharashtra, India
Email: info@startupandall.com  |  Phone: +91 90286 97373
terms-of-use:
Legal

Terms of Use

The terms that govern your access to and use of startupandall.com and our services.

Last updated: 04 June 2026Effective date: 04 June 2026

Welcome to Startup and All (“we”, “us”, “our”, or the “Brand”), a brand owned and operated by Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP (the “Firm”). These Terms of Use (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of our website www.startupandall.com (the “Website”) and any services availed through it (the “Services”). By accessing or using the Website or availing any Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and Refund Policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use immediately.

1. Definitions

  • “User”, “You”, or “Your” means any natural or legal person who accesses the Website or avails the Services.
  • “Company”, “We”, “Us”, or “Our” means Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP, operating under the brand name “Startup and All”.
  • “Services” means the legal-tech facilitation, registration, filing, compliance, and administrative support services offered through the Website.

2. Nature of Our Services — Important Disclaimer

Startup and All is a private legal-tech and business facilitation platform. It is NOT a law firm, chartered accountancy firm, company secretary firm, trademark agent, or a representative of any Government authority, and it does not solicit or advertise professional services.

  • The content on the Website is for general informational purposes only and does NOT constitute legal, tax, accounting, secretarial, or professional advice.
  • Registrations, approvals, and certificates are issued solely by the respective Government authorities and are subject to their discretion.
  • Where statutory representation is required, services are performed only by independent, duly qualified professionals appointed separately in accordance with applicable law.
  • We give no assurance or guarantee regarding timelines, approvals, or registrations, which depend on Government authorities and factors beyond our control.

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years of age and competent to enter into a legally binding contract under the Indian Contract Act, 1872. By using the Services, you represent and warrant that you meet these requirements and that all information provided by you is true, accurate, and complete.

4. Account Registration

You may browse the Website without registering. To avail certain Services, you may be required to register and provide accurate information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorised use.

5. Fees, Charges, and Payments

  • Our Services are not free; charges depend on the plan or service you choose. Unless otherwise stated, all fees are quoted in Indian Rupees (INR) and are exclusive of applicable taxes such as GST.
  • Fees are typically split into professional/service fees (payable to us) and Government/statutory fees (payable to authorities on your behalf).
  • Payments are processed through third-party payment gateways. We are not responsible for errors, delays, or failures attributable to such gateways.
  • We reserve the right to revise our fee policy at any time. Changes will be posted on the Website and become effective immediately upon posting. For current pricing, refer to the pricing page on the Website or your service proposal.

6. User Obligations and Conduct

By using the Website and Services, you agree NOT to:

  • Provide false, misleading, forged, or fraudulent information or documents.
  • Use the Services for any unlawful, fraudulent, or prohibited purpose, including money laundering or tax evasion.
  • Infringe the intellectual property or other rights of the Company or any third party.
  • Introduce viruses, malware, or any harmful code, or attempt to gain unauthorised access to the Website or its systems.
  • Copy, reproduce, scrape, or republish any content from the Website without prior written permission.

You are solely responsible for compliance with all applicable laws, including those of India, in connection with your use of the Services and the documents you submit.

7. Service Delivery and Client Cooperation

Timely delivery of Services depends on your prompt provision of accurate information, documents, and approvals, and on the processing timelines of Government authorities. Delays caused by incomplete documentation, non-responsiveness, or authority backlogs are beyond our control. Estimated timelines, where provided, are indicative only and stated in the relevant service proposal or order summary.

8. Intellectual Property

All content on the Website, including text, graphics, logos, trademarks (including the “Startup and All” name and logo), designs, and software, is the property of Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP or its licensors and is protected under applicable intellectual property laws. You may not use, reproduce, or distribute any such content without our prior written consent. The “Startup and All” name and mark are owned by Mr. Sachin Shantaram Gadekar and are used by the Firm under his authorisation.

9. Third-Party Links and Content

The Website may contain links to third-party websites or services. We do not control and are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or accuracy of such third-party websites. Access to them is at your own risk.

10. Disclaimers and Limitation of Liability

  • The Website and Services are provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied.
  • We do not warrant that the Website will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure, or that defects will be corrected.
  • To the maximum extent permitted by law, our total aggregate liability arising out of or in connection with the Services shall not exceed the professional/service fees actually paid by you to us for the specific Service giving rise to the claim.
  • We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, goodwill, or data.

11. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Company, the Firm, its partners, employees, and associated professionals from and against any claims, losses, liabilities, damages, costs, and expenses (including legal fees) arising out of your breach of these Terms, your violation of any law, or the inaccuracy of any information or documents provided by you.

12. Force Majeure

We shall not be liable for any failure or delay in performance caused by events beyond our reasonable control, including natural disasters, pandemics, strikes, technical failures, changes in law, or Government action or inaction.

13. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Website or Services, with or without notice, if you breach these Terms, provide false information, or engage in any unlawful or fraudulent activity. Provisions relating to fees, intellectual property, disclaimers, limitation of liability, and indemnification shall survive termination.

14. Refunds

Refunds, where applicable, are governed strictly by our Refund Policy, which forms an integral part of these Terms. Please review the Refund Policy carefully before availing any Service.

15. Amendments to Terms

We may amend these Terms at any time. Updated Terms will be posted on the Website with a revised “Last updated” date and become effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Website or Services constitutes acceptance of the amended Terms.

16. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall first be attempted to be resolved amicably. Failing amicable resolution, disputes shall be referred to arbitration under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996, seated at Pune, Maharashtra, conducted in English. Subject to arbitration, the courts at Pune, Maharashtra shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

17. Grievance Redressal

For any grievance regarding the Services or these Terms, you may contact our Grievance Officer at info@startupandall.com. We endeavour to acknowledge grievances within 48 hours and resolve them within 15 days.

18. Contact Us

For questions about these Terms, please contact:

refund-policy:
Legal

Refund Policy

Startup and All — a brand of Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP.

Last updated: 04 June 2026Effective date: 04 June 2026

This Refund Policy (“Policy”) applies to all services availed from Startup and All (“we”, “us”, “our”), a brand owned and operated by Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP. This Policy forms an integral part of our Terms of Use and should be read together with them. By engaging our services, you acknowledge and agree to the terms set out below.

1. Overview

We understand that circumstances may change after you engage our services. This Policy outlines the conditions under which you may cancel a service and request a refund. Because our work involves time-bound professional effort, government filings, and commitments made on your behalf to third-party professionals, refunds are governed by the specific rules below and by the relevant service proposal.

2. Two Types of Fees

Our fees are broadly divided into two categories, each with its own refund treatment:

  • Professional / Service Fees: Fees charged by us for our facilitation, coordination, documentation, and advisory support.
  • Government / Statutory Fees: Fees we collect and hold on your behalf for payment to Government authorities, regulators, or statutory portals.

3. Refund Eligibility

3.1 Professional / Service Fees

Professional fee refund requests must be submitted within 7 days from the date of order placement, or at any time before work on your order has commenced, whichever is earlier. Once work has commenced — including documentation, drafting, coordination, or statutory filing processes — or the service has been delivered, professional fees are non-refundable and a refund cannot be processed.

3.2 Government / Statutory Fees

Government fees that we hold on your behalf remain refundable at any time, provided they have NOT already been remitted to the Government authority. Once government fees are paid to the authorities, they are non-refundable, as they are outside our control.

4. Non-Refundable Situations

Refunds will NOT be granted in the following circumstances:

  • The service has been completed or substantially performed.
  • Government or statutory fees have already been paid to the authorities.
  • Delays or rejections caused by inaccurate, incomplete, or false information or documents provided by you.
  • Delays attributable to Government authorities, change in law, or other factors beyond our control.
  • Your failure to respond, cooperate, or provide required documents within a reasonable time.
  • Rejection of an application by a Government authority on its merits, as outcomes are not within our control.
  • Change of mind after work has commenced, beyond the eligible refund window.

5. Discretionary and Partial Refunds

Each refund request is evaluated on a case-by-case basis. Where a service has been partly performed, any approved refund will be calculated after deducting the value of work already done, government fees already paid, third-party charges, and applicable transaction or gateway charges. We reserve the right to offer a partial refund, a service credit, or a substitute service in lieu of a monetary refund, at our discretion. Applicable payment gateway or transaction charges may be deducted from any approved refund.

6. How to Request a Refund

To request cancellation or a refund, please submit a written request by email to info@startupandall.com with the following details:

  • Your order ID or invoice number.
  • The service name and package details.
  • The reason for cancellation or refund.
  • Any supporting documentation.

7. Processing Timeline

  • We acknowledge refund/cancellation requests within 1-2 business days.
  • We provide a decision on refund eligibility within 3 business days of receiving complete information.
  • Approved refunds are processed within 7–14 business days and credited to the original mode of payment.
  • The time for the amount to reflect in your account depends on your bank or payment provider and is beyond our control.

8. Mode of Refund

Approved refunds will be made to the original payment method used at the time of purchase, unless otherwise agreed in writing. Refunds will be made in Indian Rupees (INR). Any bank charges or foreign exchange conversion costs, where applicable, will be borne by the customer.

9. No Guarantee of Outcomes

Startup and All is a private facilitation platform and does not guarantee approvals, registrations, or outcomes, which rest solely with the relevant Government authorities. A rejection or delay by an authority does not, by itself, entitle you to a refund of professional fees for work already performed.

10. Chargebacks

If you initiate a chargeback or payment dispute with your bank or card provider without first contacting us and following this Policy, we reserve the right to contest it with supporting evidence of services rendered. We encourage you to resolve concerns directly with us first.

11. Changes to This Policy

We may revise this Refund Policy from time to time. The revised Policy will be posted on the Website with a new “Last updated” date and will apply to orders placed after that date.

12. Contact Us

For any questions about this Refund Policy or to submit a request, please contact:

Sachin Gadekar Advisory LLP (operating as Startup and All)
Pune, Maharashtra, India
Email: info@startupandall.com  |  Phone: +91 90286 97373
